description_long: This lamppost features a vibrant, multicolored design with three ornate lamp heads branching out from a central column. The lamp heads are rounded with domed tops and finials, each supported by a gently curved arm. The central pole is segmented with decorative bands and geometric patterns, sitting atop a square base adorned with numbers and additional embellishments. The overall style is whimsical and artistic, reminiscent of a public art installation or a themed urban park fixture. The surface appears to be hard and smooth, likely made of painted metal with a protective finish. No signage or attachments are visible, and the structure is firmly mounted to the ground.
description: A colorful, artistically decorated lamppost with three ornate, domed lamp heads and a segmented, patterned pole on a square base.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three lamp heads, the curved arms, and the detailed, multicolored pole and base.
description_view_1: Side view with only the central lamp head visible, highlighting the vertical alignment and decorative pole details.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the three lamp heads and the full spread of the arms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single lamp head visible, emphasizing the pole's segmented design and base.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Domed, globe-style lamp heads with finials and decorative banding, reminiscent of whimsical or artistic urban fixtures.
